The seventh and outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in its [[Star system/Legends|system]], '''Vo''' was a frozen, [[Moon/Legends|moonless]], lifeless rock. It was located in the [[Sacorrian system]], one of the [[Outlier systems]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], in the [[Arrowhead]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. In [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], the [[Sacorrian Triad|government]] of Vo's system-mate [[Sacorria]] [[Corellian Crisis|attempted]] to secede from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Description==
Vo was the seventh [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sacorrian system]], located in the [[Outlier systems]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]],<ref name="CCW" /> in the [[Arrowhead]]<ref name="Atlas" /> portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The farthest world in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] from its [[Star/Legends|sun]], [[Sacorria (star)|Sacorria]], Vo was a [[Moon/Legends|moonless]], frozen rock devoid of life.<ref name="CCW" />

==History==
Several ancient shrines and vaults on the planet Vo had been looted by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]].<ref name="Smuggler" /><ref name="Asleep" /> During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that [[Declaration of a New Order|replaced]] the Republic in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Vo's [[Sector/Legends|sector]] was placed under the control of a [[Diktat]] who answered to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. After the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] gained control of the Corellian sector, a [[Governor/Legends|governor-general]] was placed in charge of the region. The [[Sacorrian Triad|Triad]] government of Vo's system-mate [[Sacorria]] [[Corellian Crisis|attempted]] to wrest control of the sector in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]] but was foiled by the New Republic.<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Vo was first mentioned in the planet list for the Sacorria entry in the [[2003]] supplement to [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', titled ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''. It was later mentioned in two Treasure Hunting crew skill missions in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''.
